---
title: "Projects"
author: ""
comments: false
citation: false
description: |
  A collection of selected academic and technical projects developed during my undergraduate studies,<br>
  including computer vision-based vehicle monitoring, face-recognition-based smart locking, and a chatbot for North-East India tourism.
listing:
  contents:
    - "*/index.qmd"
    - "/*/index.markdown"
    - "/*/index.md"
    - "external-items/metadata.yml"
  type: grid
  fields: [title, subtitle, categories, date, image]
  sort: "date-modified desc"
  filter-ui: false
  image-align: left
  image-height: 100%
format: 
  html: 
    page-layout: full
title-block-banner: false

header-includes: >
  <link rel="stylesheet" href="../assets/listing-default.css">
#  <link rel="" href="../assets/custom-css.js">
resources:
  - ../assets/listing-default.css
#  - ../assets/custom-css.js
---
